calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIN E. DALY, ESQ. of Schiff Hardin (Tel: 415-901-8654) appearing for petitioner Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Petition And Motion To Confirm FINRA-DR Arbitration Award.

Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petition And Motion To Confirm FINRA-DR Arbitration Award granted. No opposition filed.

Order and separate judgment both signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
